name: Blue Wednesday
short_description: Blue Wednesday is a relaxing and lovely adventure game focused on story, music, and characters. Explore the city, meet various characters, and have conversations. Listen to their stories, play mini-games, collect music albums, and play music.
detailed_description:
CHECK OUT SKEL DUNGEON HERE!


About the Game

Enter the enchanting world of Blue Wednesday, an interactive game that takes you to the vibrant city of Evans. As jazz pianist Morris, you'll explore the city, interact with other characters, play amazing piano, and much more. Join in and have fun in this picturesque world!


See life through Morris's eyes and fall in love with failure, love and jazz.


Explore the city of Evans with music

Step into Morris' shoes and explore the city's vibrant streets through mini-games, cutscenes, and conversations with unique characters.

Discover rare albums and Collect sheet music

Interact with various spots around the city of Evans and encounter other characters to discover rare music albums. From tango to bossa nova, cool jazz to modern jazz, collect a wide range of albums and enrich your rhythm plays.


Meet the colorful cast

Interact with your neighbors, each with their own story. The choices you make shape the story and lead to collecting valuable items.

Rich mini-games

Play delightful mini-games that appear at key moments and make your journey more exciting based on your choices.




If you like this game, please add it to your wishlist! Help us spread this lovely game!

supported_languages: English, Korean, French, German, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
